posts.author: dedmiston (Derrick Edmiston)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

While playing with Monday vibe early access, I noticed that it auto publishes once you set the dashboard integration published the first time.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be better to be able select when it publishes and be able to revert changes as sometimes while running the AI chatbot it will make changes to the entire dashboard that completely changes the setup that was worked on.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Derrick_CAVU! I’m Amichay from monday.com
We are planning to release the option to revert changes in the next two weeks.
We are also looking at the ability to disable auto-publishing versions. We’ll want to see how relevant it is once you can easily revert back to the previous version.

Thanks for the feedback!

posts.author: dedmiston (Derrick Edmiston)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @amichay ! Wil be happy to test it here soon!

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dedmiston ! It’s already available (for changes made in the last week)!
Scroll up to a previous prompt and click on the revert icon to bring the app back to the state it was before the change:

image780×818 63.5 KB

posts.author: agatha32 (Agatha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Derrick_CAVU,

I totally get the frustration with auto-publishing in Monday Vibe. While the feature to disable it isn’t available yet, the good news is that you can now revert changes made in the last week. Just scroll up to the previous prompt and click the revert icon to restore the app to its earlier state.

Hope this helps!
